content: Orchestrator started session. Task: Ping each team lead and have them respond with their team's capabilities. Delegating to all three leads in parallel.

Planning team capabilities: Architect (opus:xhigh) handles system design, ADRs, API contracts — writes to specs/**. Spec Writer (sonnet:high) produces implementable specs with acceptance criteria — writes to specs/**. Team handles system design, technical specs, architecture decisions, design review.

Engineering team capabilities: Backend Dev (sonnet:high) handles APIs, business logic, data models — writes to src/backend/**, tests/backend/**. Frontend Dev (sonnet:high) handles UI components, state management, interactions — writes to src/frontend/**, tests/frontend/**. Team handles full-stack implementation.

Validation team capabilities: QA Engineer (sonnet:high) writes/runs tests, coverage analysis — writes to tests/**. Security Reviewer (sonnet:high) is read-only, audits for vulnerabilities, auth gaps, dependency risks. Team handles test creation, coverage gaps, security audits, pre-merge validation.
All three leads responded with capabilities reports. System is operational.
